events.text: Goal! Germany 0, Côte d'Ivoire 1. Franck Kessie (Côte d'Ivoire) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner.
Substitution, Germany. Antonio Rüdiger replaces Nico Schlotterbeck because of an injury.
Substitution, Germany. Jamie Leweling replaces Leroy Sané.
Substitution, Germany. Deniz Undav replaces Jamal Musiala.
Substitution, Germany. Nadiem Amiri replaces Aleksandar Pavlovic.
Goal! Germany 1, Côte d'Ivoire 1. Deniz Undav (Germany) left footed shot from very close range to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Nadiem Amiri with a cross.
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Evann Guessand replaces Ange-Yoan Bonny.
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Seko Fofana replaces Ibrahim Sangaré.
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Simon Adingra replaces Amad Diallo.
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Guéla Doué replaces Wilfried Singo because of an injury.
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Nicolas Pépé replaces Yan Diomande.
Substitution, Germany. Leon Goretzka replaces Kai Havertz.
Goal! Germany 2, Côte d'Ivoire 1. Deniz Undav (Germany) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Felix Nmecha with a through ball.
